desc: You've made it to the top! All you have to do now is get down.

exits.desc: It's a long slide down.

extra_descs.desc: The pole still looks pretty bad, but it doesn't look quite as bad as before.

name: The Top of the Greasepole

desc:
This is the main reception desk for the Wally World residence.  You are able
to see the incoming mail behind the desk as well as hooks for keys to hang
upon.  To the east there is a door and just south of you is the lobby.

extra_descs.desc: Unfortunately you don't see any keys hanging off of any of the hooks.
Why are you trying to look at the mail, it's private!

name: Reception Desk

desc:
This is the main office associated with the Wally World residence.  There is
a desk, chair and filing cabinet in the room.  There is only one exit from the
room, west.

exits.desc: This way leads back to the reception desk.

extra_descs.desc:
Looking through the files you see that Wally World was originally slated to
have at least eleven levels but the designers got sick and tired of it and gave
up after just a few levels.

The desk, like the chair, is completely normal.  The desk is also in
excellent condition.

The chair is not unusual in any way whatsoever.  The chair is in excellent
condition.

name: Main Office

desc:
This lobby is the perfect area to make a meeting place, assuming of course
that you can find it again.  Just to make it easy to rediscover, exits have
been handily located to both the east and west.

exits.desc: This leads to a handy stairwell.
This leads towards the exit.

name: Lobby

desc: This is, as it says, a stairwell.  The exits are west and up.

exits.desc: This leads to the lobby.
This leads up into the unknown.

name: Stairwell

desc: This is another stairwell.  The exits are west, up, and down.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
This leads up into the unknown.
This leads down into the known.

name: Stairwell

desc:
This is a landing with halls heading off in all the cardinal directions.
The only problem is that, the hall to the west is blocked by a door.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.

name: Landing

desc:
What a waste of effort it was to come in here...  There is absolutely
nothing, not even brooms.  And there is no other exit to boot, just the one you
came in!

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.

name: Broom Closet

desc:
The hall continues north-south and there is a doorway on either side of the
hall.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.

extra_descs.desc:
This is a nice, groovy, red patterned carpet which extends all the way down
the hall.
The door on the west has the number 206 and the door on the east, 205.

name: Hallway

desc:
This room is sparsely furnished but you notice one thing upon entering...
The floor is tiled, while the hallways are carpeted.  I wonder why?  There is
only one exit...  The one you came in...

exits.desc: This leads back to the hall.

extra_descs.desc: It is a nice friendly ceramic tile floor.

name: Private Room 205

desc:
This room is sparsely furnished but you notice one thing upon entering...
The floor is tiled, while the hallways are carpeted.  I wonder why?  There is
only one exit...  The one you came in...

exits.desc: This leads back to the hall.

extra_descs.desc: It is a nice friendly ceramic tile floor.

name: Private Room 206

desc:
The hall leads to the south and there is a doorway on either side of the
hall as well as one to the north.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.

extra_descs.desc:
This is a nice, groovy, red patterned carpet which extends all the way down
the hall.

The door on the west has the number 204 and the door on the east, 203 while
the door to the north has the number 201.

exits.desc: This leads back to the hall.

name: Private Room 208

desc:
The hall leads to the north and there is a doorway on either side of the
hall as well as one to the south.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.

extra_descs.desc:
This is a nice, groovy, red patterned carpet which extends all the way down
the hall.

The door on the west has the number 210 and the door on the east, 209 and the
door to the south has the number 202.

This room is sparsely furnished but you notice one thing upon entering...

exits.desc: This leads back to the hall.

name: Private Room 202

desc: This is another stairwell.  The exits are west, up, and down.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.
This leads up into the unknown.
This leads down into the known.

name: Stairwell

desc:
This is a landing with halls heading off in all the cardinal directions.
The only problem is that, the hall to the west is blocked by a door.

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.

You can't tell where this leads.
You can't tell where this leads.

name: Landing

desc:
What a waste of effort it was to come in here...  There is absolutely
nothing, not even brooms.  And to boot there is no other exit, just the one you
came in!

exits.desc: You can't tell where this leads.

name: Broom Closet

desc:
This hallway comes to an abrupt halt as there is a door in its way directly
to the north.  Coincidentally, there are also doors to the east and west.  The
only exit without a door in fact is to the south!

exits.desc: The door is locked, so therefore you cannot see through it.
The door is the door of room 301.
The hallway continues to the south.
The door is the door of room 302.

extra_descs.desc: The doors all lead to rooms.

name: Hallway

desc:
This room is quite well furnished and could probably comfortably house two
people.  It is much larger than the rooms downstairs.

exits.desc: The door leads back into the hallway.

name: Private Room 301

desc:
This room is quite well furnished and could probably comfortably house two
people.  It is much larger than the rooms downstairs.

exits.desc: The door leads back into the hallway.

name: Private Room 302

desc:
This office is the main office for all the residences of the University of
North XXX.  There is a large desk here as well as two plush chairs.  In the
north-west corner of the room there is a trapdoor in the ceiling.

exits.desc: The door leads to the hallway.
The trapdoor leads up... beyond that, you aren't sure where it goes.

extra_descs.desc: The trapdoor is neatly fastened with a small hook.

The desk and chairs are neatly arranged as if in preparation for an upcoming
meeting or something of the sort.

name: Main Residence Office

desc:
This hallway comes to an abrupt halt as there is a door in its way directly
to the south.  Coincidentally, there are also doors to the east and west.  The
only exit without a door in fact is to the north!

exits.desc: The hallway continues to the north.
The door is the door of room 303.
The door is for room 305.
The door is the door of room 304.

extra_descs.desc: The doors all lead to rooms.

name: Hallway

desc:
This room is quite well furnished and could probably comfortably house two
people.  It is much larger than the rooms downstairs.

exits.desc: The door leads back into the hallway.

name: Private Room 304

desc:
This room is quite well furnished and could probably comfortably house two
people.  It is much larger than the rooms downstairs.

exits.desc: The door leads back into the hallway.

name: Private Room 303

desc:
This room is quite well furnished and could probably comfortably house two
people.  It is much larger than the rooms downstairs.

exits.desc: The door leads back into the hallway.

name: Private Room 300

desc:
This attic is carefully hidden away from sight as it is used as a secret
storeroom.  The only exit is down.

exits.desc: You see nothing special.
You see the office below.

extra_descs.desc: Beyond the grate you can see another small storage room.

name: Attic

desc:
This is the really secret storage room attached to the attic.  There are two
exits from it.  The main exit is through the grate to the north but there is a
chute down to the first floor located in the floor.

exits.desc: The attic is just north of here.
A chute leads down from this room.

extra_descs.desc: Beyond the grate you can see the attic.
The chute is rather smooth and looks to be a fun ride.

name: Small Storage Room

desc: WHEEEEEEEEEEEE!  What a fun ride!!!!  Fortunately the only exit is down.

exits.desc: The chute continues down.

extra_descs.desc: The chute is rather smooth and is quite a fun ride.

name: The Chute

desc:
The road would normally run north-south, but the way south is blocked by a
small obstacle...  An overturned policemobile.  There are houses on either side
of the road.

exits.desc: To escape the ghetto, you can head this way.
A shack-like ghetto house stands (barely) there.
A shack-like ghetto house stands (barely) there.

extra_descs.desc: It is blocking the road quite nicely.  Maybe it is meant to impede passage.

name: The Ghetto

desc: It's a mess.

exits.desc: An exit from this hellhole.

extra_descs.desc: Need you ask?

name: Ghetto House

desc: You feel a little apprehensive as you enter this house...  It's a mess.

exits.desc: An exit from this hellhole.
An exit from this hellhole.  Looks like another hellhole though.

extra_descs.desc: Need you ask?

name: Frec House

desc: It looks like a hellhole...  It's a mess.

exits.desc: An exit from this hellhole to yet another hellhole.
An exit from this hellhole.

extra_descs.desc: Never seen one before?
Need you ask?

name: Ghetto House

desc:
The road would normally run north-south, but the way north is blocked by a
small obstacle...  An overturned policemobile.  There is a house to the west.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues south.
A run-down house lies to the west.

extra_descs.desc: It is blocking the road quite nicely.  Maybe it is meant to impede passage.
It's in bad shape.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
This intersection is the joining point of what's left of University Avenue
and Earl Road which heads off to the east.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues north.
It seems to be less run-down in this direction.
The ghetto continues south.
A fairly well-kept house lies to the west.

extra_descs.desc: It's not run-down.

name: The Ghetto Intersection

desc:
This part of the ghetto has survived in a better condition than the rest of
the ghetto.  A house lies to the north.

exits.desc: A fairly well-kept house is north.
The ghetto continues east.
The ghetto continues west.

extra_descs.desc: It's not run-down.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
Earl Road ends abruptly as there is a house built immediately to the east.
Another stands to the south.

exits.desc: A very well-kept house is east.
A very well-kept house is south.
The ghetto continues west.

extra_descs.desc: It's not run-down at all.

name: The Ghetto

desc: This house reminds you of home, your parent's home.  It's mind-boggling.

exits.desc: You may exit to the west.

name: Gael House

desc: This house reminds you of home, your aunt's home.  Now, that's absurd.

exits.desc: You may exit to the north.

name: Gael House

desc:
Papers and calculators litter the room, making an otherwise neat house,
messy.

exits.desc: You may exit to the south.

extra_descs.desc:
Illegible notes are scribbled on the papers.  Large numbers are punched in on
the calculators, making them seem important.

name: Boss House

desc:
This part of the ghetto seems to have survived.  To the west, you can see,
behind the rubble, the vague outlines of a house.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues north.
The ghetto continues south.

extra_descs.desc: It's run-down.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
This part of the ghetto seems to have survived.  To the east, you can see
the A & Z Supermarket.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues north.
The A & Z Supermarket looms to the east.
The ghetto continues south.

extra_descs.desc: Seems to be the only supermarket around.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
This part of the ghetto seems to have survived.  There are houses on either
side of the road.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues north.
There is a run-down house to the east.
The ghetto continues south.
There is a fairly well-kept house to the west.

extra_descs.desc: The houses are in relatively ok condition.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
This part of the ghetto seems to have survived.  There is a house to the
east.  South of you, you can see the end of the ghetto.

exits.desc: The ghetto continues north.
There is a very well-kept house to the east.
The ghetto continues south.

extra_descs.desc: The houses are in relatively ok condition.

name: The Ghetto

desc:
Aisles and aisles of foodstuffs are waiting to be bought by unknowing
customers.

exits.desc: The automatic doors hide the ghetto.

extra_descs.desc: It's a supermarket, what did you expect?

name: The A & Z Supermarket

desc:
This house reminds you of your room, only worse.  It seems to be a
post-holocaust version of it.

exits.desc: You will exit to the west.

name: Frec House

desc:
Papers and calculators litter the room, making an otherwise neat house,
messy.

exits.desc: You may exit to the east.

extra_descs.desc:
Illegible notes are scribbled on the papers.  Large numbers are punched in on
the calculators, making them seem important.

name: Boss House

desc: This house reminds you of home, your grandma's home.  It's insane.

exits.desc: You may exit to the west.

name: Gael House

desc:
Papers and calculators litter the room, making an otherwise neat house,
messy.

exits.desc: You may exit to the east.
You may exit to the south, but it would probably not be a wise idea.

extra_descs.desc:
Illegible notes are scribbled on the papers.  Large numbers are punched in on
the calculators, making them seem important.

name: Boss House

desc:
This house reminds you of your room, only worse.  It seems to be a
post-holocaust version of it.

exits.desc: You will exit to the north.  Even if it is to another ghetto house.

name: Frec House

desc:
A spiralling stairwell leads both up and down.  To the east, there is an
exit to the auditorium.

exits.desc: As I said, there is an exit to the auditorium.
Upstairs is the balcony, you believe.
It is too dark to tell.

name: Stairwell

desc:
Many rows of seats line the floor of the auditorium.  This is where are the
important get-togethers are held.  It is quite impressive.  But there seems to
be some splotches on the seats.  To the west is a stairwell, and the auditorium
continues east.  A balcony looms overhead.

exits.desc: The auditorium continues.
To the west, is a stairwell.

extra_descs.desc:
The splotches on the seats seem to be some sort of purple dye which rained
down upon them.  (Strange!  )

name: The West Aisle Of The Auditorium

desc:
Many rows of seats line the floor of the auditorium.  This is where are the
important get-togethers are held.  It is quite impressive.  But there seems to
be some splotches on the seats.  The auditorium continues east and west.  A
balcony looms overhead.  To the south is the stage.

exits.desc: The auditorium continues.
The stage is to the south.
The auditorium continues.

extra_descs.desc:
The splotches on the seats seem to be some sort of purple dye which rained
down upon them.  (Strange!  )

name: The Center Aisle Of The Auditorium

desc:
Many rows of seats line the floor of the auditorium.  This is where are the
important get-togethers are held.  It is quite impressive.  But there seems to
be some splotches on the seats.  To the north is the entry hall, and the
auditorium continues west.  A balcony looms overhead.

exits.desc: The entry hall lies to the north.
The auditorium continues.

extra_descs.desc:
The splotches on the seats seem to be some sort of purple dye which rained
down upon them.  (Strange!  )

name: The East Aisle Of The Auditorium

desc:
This is the stage which overlooks the entire auditorium.  The stage is about
three to four feet off the main floor.  Drab brown curtains frame the outside
of the stage, giving it a stage-like appearance.  Huge cords and pulleys swing
overhead, obviously used for special effects for the non magically active.
The floor is made of sturdy wooden planks.  Backstage, you can see several
props and huge objects to fill in the background of the stage.  Looking out
into the auditorium, you can see rows and rows of seats and a milk dispenser in
the back.  The walls are...  Why am I doing this?  Most people don't even read
the descriptions of the rooms unless looking for a door of some sort!  Well
there is no door here.  I bet you have brief mode on, don't you?  So you are
probably missing several of our witty jokes!  Why must we go through all this
painstaking writing of descriptions, if they aren't going to be read?  You
probably aren't even reading this!  [Editorial :)] Well, anyways, the only exit
is to the north.

exits.desc: The auditorium is to the north.

extra_descs.desc: They are sturdy.  They are wooden.  They are planks.
Hey!  It can make you look like you are flying!
They are just your average, everyday, drab brown curtains.

name: The Stage

desc: The stairwell spirals upwards and downwards.  The balcony lies to the east.

exits.desc: As I said, the balcony lies to the east.
This leads to the clock tower.
You came from downstairs, don't you remember?

name: Upper Stairwell

desc: Wow!  Finally in the balcony!  Now what?

exits.desc: It's the stairwell again!  Imagine that!

name: The Balcony

desc:
The spiralling stairs lead down into a cold, dark, damp room.  The walls are
stone, with a few unsightly cracks caused by the sands of time.  Cobwebs cling
to the walls, undisturbed for a long time.  Dust lines the floor.  A huge stone
door lies to the east.  A stairwell sits quietly in the corner.

exits.desc: It's the same stairwell.

extra_descs.desc: The huge stone door looks very inviting.
Don't disturb them now!

name: Entrance To The Catacombs

desc:
This room seems to be the inside of the large clock which covers all sides
of the Grant Hall clock tower.  You can see lots of little gears connected to
lots of big gears.  There is absolutely no view seeing that the clock faces are
opaque.  But, there is an exit that you can use by going down.

exits.desc: This leads back into the stairwell.

name: The Grant Hall Clock

desc:
This hallway leads through the older building called Frosty Annex.
Unfortunately, the building seems to be living up to its name.  The hallway
leads east-west with a room to the north and a door to the south.

exits.desc: There is a fairly large room to the north.
The hall continues to the east.
There is a door blocking the way to the south.
The hall continues towards the entrance.

extra_descs.desc: This is a standard solid metal door with no window in it whatsoever.

name: Hallway

desc:
The hallway continues along here.  In fact it continues both east and west.
There is however a door to the south.

exits.desc: The hallway continues.

There is another of those large metal doors to the south without a
window.
The hallway continues in this direction as well.

extra_descs.desc:
This door is the main reason for having this room where it is...  Anyways,
the is a large metal affair with no window.

name: Hallway

desc:
The hallway continues here, but only in one direction.  West.  There is a
door to the north and stairs leading down, but otherwise this section of the
hall is no different than the rest.

exits.desc: A door with the word "OFFICE" emblazoned on it stands to your north.
The hallway does not continue in this direction.
The hallway continues in this direction.
A stairwell leads down into the darkness.

name: Hallway

desc:
This room is actually quite a large laboratory.  It contains all of those
neat things that you would expect to find in a laboratory, like, well, lab
equipment.  You can see all of the equipment that you see in your 8:30 am
Monday Chemistry Lab.  But hey, don't think I'm bitter about this, no, it's not
that I have to actually get up early after a nice relaxing weekend, but you are
probably in situation like this, and if you aren't, boy do I ever envy you.
Anyways, there is a door to the north.

exits.desc: A large, steel door stands to the north.

extra_descs.desc:
This is just ordinary lab equipment that you would find in any normal
laboratory.

name: Mike-Lab

desc:
This lab is well decked out with all sorts of modern devices, of course,
your definition of modern is probably extremely different from the scientists'
definition as all of the devices would make Stone-Age devices look like
technological marvels.  This lab is devoid of personnel but all of the machines
are making scary humming noises.  You should probably make a beeline out the
door to the north.

exits.desc:
A door stands to the north.  This door is made of steel and is fairly
large.

extra_descs.desc:
These Stone-Age marvels sound like they are going to explode any minute,
better take cover soon!

name: John-Lab

desc:
This office looks extremely comfortable, that is if you don't mind an awful
row coming from below and if you don't mind breezes coming through the large
gaps in the wall.  Other than that, it does look alright.  There is one exit,
the one to the south, which just happens to be blocked by a door.

exits.desc:
The door blocking your way is well made.  It seems to be made of Oak with a
well designed brass doorknob.

extra_descs.desc:
There are some horrendously large holes in the wall which are letting all the
warm air out, and all the colder outside air in.

name: Office

desc:
This lab is unlike any of the other labs you have seen in this building.
If perchance you haven't seen any, then the reason is quite obvious.  If,
however, you have passed through one or two labs on the way, the reason is even
more obvious, as this room contains all sorts of nice computer equipment.
There is a staircase leading up is one corner of the room.

exits.desc:
The staircase in the north-east corner leads up towards the main floor
of the building.

name: Jeff-Lab

desc:
This is another of the seemingly neverending series of classrooms on Campus.
Of course, you don't expect anything less, this being a university, but I
presume that you agree with me that enough is enough.  There is a hallway to
the south.

exits.desc: The hallway lies to the south.

name: A Classroom

desc: This hallway leads through the building in all cardinal directions.

exits.desc: It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.

name: A Hallway

desc: This hallway leads through the building in most directions.

exits.desc: It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.
It is too dark to tell.

name: A Classroom

desc:
This hallway is radically different from all the others in that it only has
two exits.  One exits to the east towards light, while the other heads west
back into the darkness.

exits.desc:
This way draws you towards it...probably because you are suffering from
light withdrawl.
You are repulsed by this exit since the exit to the east is well lit.

extra_descs.desc: Are you mad?
It's nice, warm, and inviting.

name: A Hallway

desc: This long corridor leads out onto the street.

exits.desc: The light beckons you.
Back into darkness, I don't think so!

extra_descs.desc: Are you mad?
It's nice, warm, and inviting.

name: The Exit

desc:
Oops, you are not supposed to be here.  This is a programmer's tool to
disperse mobs all over campus.  Exits go in all directions.  This goes all over
Campus.

exits.desc: This is just an exit.

desc:
This is the central chute for mob dispersal.  The exits lead to the other
mob chutes.  You are not supposed to be here.  This is essentially for every
other Mob so that they can be spread out at complete random.

This is leads to Mob Chute B.
This is leads to Mob Chute C.
This is leads to Mob Chute D.

name: Central Mob Chute

desc:
This large spacious lecture theater would probably seat close to 300 and
reminds you of movie theaters of old (like when they sat more than 10).  Its
main purpose seems to exist and collect dust.  Maybe someone is doing some kind
of study here.  There is a sign on the east wall near the front of the room.

exits.desc: This leads towards the street.

extra_descs.desc:
The sign on the wall seems to have something to do with fire regulations, but
it is so old and faded, you cannot read it.

name: Dunning Auditorium

desc:
This hallway is not completely empty but looks like it is.  Must be
something related to the Infinite Improbability Principle.

exits.desc: There is a classroom to the north.
The lobby is back towards the east through some strange freak of nature.

extra_descs.desc: See the Douglas Adams Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy series.

name: A Completely Empty Hallway

desc:
This seems to be the only classroom in Dunning Hall.  Strange, the building
looked larger on the outside.  Obviously some sort of principle related to the
TARDIS principle on Doctor Who....

exits.desc: A hallway leads off to the south.

extra_descs.desc:
The TARDIS is the ship that Doctor Who travelled the universe and the
timestreams with.

name: Classroom

desc: This stairwell leads up into the heights of Leonard Hall.

exits.desc: This leads back to the lobby.
This leads up.  Nuff said.

name: East Stairwell

desc: This leads up into the heights of Leonard Hall.

exits.desc: This leads back to the lobby.
This stairwell goes up into the darkness.

name: West Stairwell

desc:
This hallway leads north and south and there is a stairwell leading down in
the place where the western wall should be found.

exits.desc: The hallway continues north.
The hallway also continues south.
The stairwell leads down towards the lobby.

name: Junction

desc: The hallway turns east-south here and there is an opening to the north.

exits.desc: There is a room of sorts to the north.
The hallway continues east.
The hallway continues south.

name: Hallway

desc:
This an ordinary dorm room that is unoccupied at the moment.  The furniture
consists of a bed, and a desk.  Nothing else.  Just a bed and a desk.  But
there is an exit to the south.

exits.desc: The hallway is south of here.

extra_descs.desc: The bed and the desk seem to be the only furnishings of this room.

name: Dorm Room

desc:
This hallway comes to an abrupt end here.  However, there are exits in all
cardinal directions except up and down.

exits.desc: There seems to be a room to the north.
There seems to be a room to the east.

Regardless of what the description says, there is no
exit in this direction.  Please try again.
The hallway continues west.
